evidence.excerpt: Sat 7th August. We set off at nine to take the boys to Rhiwiau Riding Centre.
Sat. 31st July. We left at 9.30, & had lunch on the Dover-Calais ferry on the way back to Westfield Rd.

boundaries.mixed_detail: End of the 1993 Italy trip (return to Westfield Rd on the Dover-Calais ferry, 31st July) on the upper part of the page; new North Wales riding trip starts at the 'Sat 7th August' heading.

evidence.excerpt: Friday 13th Aug. Left at 6.10. Heavy traffic. Camped in a small, sheltered site
After lunch we headed home... Fortunately, we got home in one piece.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Previous riding trip ends ('we headed home... got home in one piece') in the upper part of the page; a new weekend trip starts at 'Friday 13th Aug' (camp, then 'Picked up boys from riding, drove home', passing the old family house 'Four Winds' near Telford).

boundaries.title_guess: Beauchamp music course & Forest of Dean

evidence.excerpt: Friday August 20th. We left at 5.45... to hear Peter's quartets at Beauchamps.
we went to explore the Forest of Dean Heritage centre... Home at about 6. pm.
Friday August 2[?]. We left at 5.0., & inspite of the Bank holiday, arrived at Beauchamp at 6.15.
went to see the cruck barn at Ashleworth Court... Then we packed up and went home.

boundaries.title_guess: Exmoor: Westermill Farm (Gawn & Polly's wedding), Dunster

evidence.excerpt: Sept 2nd Thu. At 6.15. we left for Exmoor, where Gavn will marry Polly Martin on Saturday.
We are staying at Westermill Farm
Friday 24 Sept. We have come away to the Cotswolds for the wkend... We left at 5.40 + got to Naunton at 7.10.

boundaries.title_guess: North Wales: Llanfairfechan, Betws-y-Coed, Dolwyddelan (pony camp)

evidence.excerpt: 16th April 1994   Charles' birthday ... set off at 9 am. to take Peter + Claire to pony camp.
We left Peter and Clare at the riding school. We drove back through Betws-y-Coed.

boundaries.title_guess: Cornwall: Upton festival, St Ives, Lizard, Trebah (Simon & Eve)

evidence.excerpt: Saturday 30th April   Just Simon + Eve! 5.0. We dropped William & Justin at Blue Goat & set off to hear Thomas in concert at Upton
Saturday 23rd April. We woke & drove through beautiful mountain scenery... picked up Clare Portal & Peter & hurried home

boundaries.mixed_detail: End of the April 1994 North Wales pony-camp trip ('Saturday 23rd April... picked up Clare Portal & Peter & hurried home') at the top of the page; a new Cornwall trip ('Just Simon + Eve!') starts at the 'Saturday 30th April' heading and runs through A_0126.

boundaries.title_guess: Brecon Beacons: Blaensan, Mountain Centre, Porth-yr-Ogof

evidence.excerpt: Friday May 27th... set off at 3.45. for Poltern to pick up Thomas... we try a new Welsh campsite Blaensan.
On to home up the I75.

boundaries.mixed_detail: End of the 1994 Cornwall trip (Saturday May 7: Saltash Bridge, Dartington Cider Press, 'On to home up the I75') on the upper part of the page; a new Brecon Beacons weekend trip starts at the 'Friday May 27th' heading.

open_at_end: Brecon Beacons trip starting A_0126_L (Friday 27 May 1994, Blaensan / Mountain Centre / Porth-yr-Ogof) is still in progress at the window end with no return home recorded yet.
notes: Window opens mid-trip: spreads A_0097-A_0110 are the continuation of the 1993 Italy/Switzerland trip (Porlezza, Cremona, Parma, Sestri Levante, Les Deux Alpes, St Jean de Vaux), which began in the previous window and ends on A_0111_L with the return to Westfield Rd on 31 July 1993; no boundary row is emitted for its start because that start lies before this window. Spread page-number ('no') fields are inconsistent/misnumbered against the index in places (e.g. A_0117 no=32 then A_0118 no=38), so boundaries are anchored on dates and narrative rather than page numbers. The two 'Beauchamp' weekends (A_0112_L, A_0112_R) and the short riding-collection trips (A_0111_R, A_0112) are short family camping outings from home, treated as separate trips.
